name: Best Ever Fudge Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F. Spray Bundt pan with Pam.
2. Cream margarines and sugar. Add eggs.
3. Combine dry ingredients and add to mixture.
4. Add buttermilk. Mix well and pour into sprayed Bundt pan.
5. Bake for 40 minutes at 350°F.
6. Cool for 15 minutes and then remove from pan.
7. Sprinkle with the powdered sugar before serving.
